title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Ecom Express Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Ecom Express Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Category Manager looking for your next big career move? Ecom Express Holdings Services in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ecom Express Holdings Services:
Ecom Express Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
